name: Poisoned Spikes
description: Deal 3 damage per second, and slow movement by 25% and attack by 15% for 5 seconds.

name: Moonglaive
description: The huntress gains the ability to hit three additional targets with a single throw of Moonglaive, dealing 66% and 33% respectively.

name: Sell
description:
Sell a fighter for 50% of its total cost including upgrades.

If a fighter is newly built, it will sell for 100%.

description:

Does not stack with Superiority

name: Superiority
description:
Increases nearby allied units damage by 18%.

name: Vital Strike

name: Knock Out

name: Envenom
description:
Deal 3 damage per second, and slow movement by 25% and attack by 15% for 5 seconds.

name: Enchanted Poison
description:
Poisonous barbs deal 11 damage per second, and slow movement by 35% and attack by 25% for 5 seconds.
Does not stack with Envenom

name: Battle Cry
description: Bear gets pumped up. Adds 12% bonus damage and 3 armor to himself and nearby units for 20 seconds.

name: Circle Slash
description: Attacks deal very small splash damage to ground units.

name: Whitefire
description: Attacks deal small splash damage to both ground and air units.

name: Precision
description: This unit has a 33% chance to do 160% damage. Affects all enemies.

name: Faerie Luck
description: Gives a 15% chance to dodge an attack.

name: Helping Hand
description:

description: Adds 40 bonus damage to an attack.

name: Fatality
description: Gives 25% evasion and a 20% chance to deal triple damage.

name: Mutilation
description: Reduces damage of target by 10%. Lasts 5 seconds (2 seconds on bosses)

name: Water Splash

name: Deluge

name: Amplify Magic

name: Energy Shield
description:
Uses mana to nullify enemy attacks. Every 1 points of mana negates 15 damage.

Affects 80% of incoming damage.

name: Focus Energy
description: Adds 1 bonus damage to every attack for every point of current mana. This skill does not consume mana itself.

name: Blue Wind 1

name: Battle Drums

description: Heals up to 5 nearby allies for 100 hp every 5 seconds.

description: Heals up to 5 nearby allies within 400 range for 200 hit points every 5 seconds

name: Faerie Fire
description: Reduce enemy's armor by 5 (lasts 5 seconds)

name: Forbidden Fruit

description: Skeletons move faster and regenerate hit points.

name: Mana Burst
description: Uses mana to add 60 bonus damage to an attack.

(14-17 Damage, 1 Speed, 145HP, Chaos/Unarmored)

description: Each attack has a 25% chance to deal 25 bonus damage and stun for 1 second.

name: Swiftness Aura

description: Deals 100 damage to up to 3 units around the Hellghost.

description: Each attack has a 5% chance to stun for 1 second

description: Attacks reduce the armor of enemy units by 4 for 15 seconds.

name: Despair Aura

Does not stack with Sickness Aura

name: Sticky Webs
description: Attacks slow the movementspeed of enemies by 40% and attackspeed by 30% for 6 seconds. Air units only.

name: Inject Steroids
description:
Buy steroids to add 200 range, 20% damage, and cause attacks to bounce to 4 targets instead of 2. Lasts for the next level only

This ability must be manually cast before the round starts.

name: Steroids
description: Range increased by 200. Damage increased by 20%.  Attacks now bounce to 4 targets instead of 2.

name: Slave Trade
description:
When the round ends, you will receive 3 gold for each surviving servant and 6 gold for each surviving slavemaster.

However, if all slavemasters are dead, no gold is received.

name: Throw Net
description:
Traps an enemy, binding it to the ground so that it cannot move. If cast on an air unit, it will pull the unit into melee range.
Lasts 7 seconds.

name: Fury
description: Has a 20% chance to increase attack speed by 70% for 8 seconds with each attack.

name: Mend
description: Calls forth a wave of healing energy that bounces up to 7 times, healing 200 hit points on the primary target. Each jump heals 5% less hit points.

name: Ashes to Ashes
description:
Ashes to Ashes: Shadow poison degrades attack speed by 10%.  This stacks with other slows.  

Each attack has a 50% chance to apply either Ashes to Ashes, or Dust to Dust.

name: Guardian Spirit
description:
At the beginning of the level, creates guardian spirits above adjacent units, causing them to take only 77% of all incoming damage.

Lasts the entire level.

name: Seduce
description: Seduces enemy units in a small area, causing them to miss on 15% of their attacks. Lasts 15 seconds.

name: Tremor
description:
Slams the ground, dealing 20 damage and slowing the movement and attack speed of nearby enemy units by 10% for 4 seconds.

Affects ground enemies only.

name: Fissure
description: Rips open the ground, dealing 95 damage and stunning enemy ground units for 1 second.

name: Dust to Dust
description:
Dust to Dust: Binds enemies to the shadow realm, causing their attacks to deal 10% less damage 

Each attack has a 50% chance to apply either Ashes to Ashes, or Dust to Dust.

name: Shadow Weave
description: Weaves in and out of the shadows, becoming a lower priority for attacking units.  This has the unfortunate side effect of causing the unit to take 50% increased magic damage.

name: Reassurance
description:
Gives 4 additional armor to friendly units close to him.
Range: 400

name: Power Surge

Unleashes a bolt of deadly energy dealing 120 damage.

Each time Zeus attacks, he gains 1 mana.

Each attack marks an enemy target, causing it to take 25% more damage from piercing attacks.

name: Multishot
description: Fires up to 2 additional arrows

The Defiler exudes a neurotoxin cloud: enemies within 180 range move and attack 12% slower.

Fangtooths gain 2 mana per attack against poisoned prey - feasting twice as fast.

name: Feast
description: Regains 50 hit points every 6 attacks - every 4th against prey poisoned by a Defiler's Neurotoxin.

name: Withdraw
description:
Causes this unit to attack 90% slower, but become impervious to damage for 3 seconds. Automatically cast when 15% or less hit points.

May not activate if this unit is killed too quickly.

name: Submerge

Trident can submerge himself once every 7 seconds.
Does not hit air units

Heals a target friendly unit for 350 hit points.
Heals a target friendly unit for 400 hit points.
Heals a target friendly unit for 450 hit points.
Heals a target friendly unit for 450 hit points.

name: Devotion Aura
description:
Gives 4 additional armor to nearby friendly units.
Range: 600

Defender Of The Realm Bonus:  If this unit is built on the blight, the 2 units to his left and right will gain an additional +3 armor

name: Devotion Aura
description:
Gives 3 additional armor to nearby friendly units.
Range: 600

Defender Of The Realm Bonus:  If this unit is built on the blight, the 2 units to his left and right will gain an additional +3 armor

name: Devotion Aura
description:
Gives 2 additional armor to nearby friendly units.
Range: 600

Defender Of The Realm Bonus:  If this unit is built on the blight, the 2 units to his left and right will gain an additional +3 armor

name: Deadly Poison
description: A poison attack that deals 100 damage per second, and slows the target enemy's movement by 25% and attack by 25% for 5 seconds.
Calls forth a wave of healing energy that bounces up to 4 times, healing 500 hit points on the primary target. Each jump heals 50% less hit points (8 second Cooldown).

name: Frost Arrows
description: Slows a target enemy unit's attack rate by 50% and movement speed by 50%.

name: Spiritual Flicker
description:
Increases a target friendly unit's damage by 20% and armor by 3. 
Lasts 15 seconds.

name: Black Arrow
description: Reduces a target enemy unit's armor by 8, Lasts 5 seconds.

name: Water Shield
description: Envelops a friendly unit in a shield of water for 15 (15) seconds, giving it +8 armor and slowing units who attack it.

name: Swipe
description: Each attack has a 30% chance to to 300 bonus damage and stun target for 4 seconds (2 seconds on boss).

name: Death Blow
description: Gives a 25% chance to do 8x damage on an attack.

name: Serpentine Agility
description: Gives a 65% chance to avoid an attack.

name: Resilience Aura
description: Gives 5 additional armor to nearby friendly units.

name: Undead's Armor
description: Gives +9 armor and slows units who attack it.

name: Spiritual Flame
description:
Increases a target friendly unit's damage by 20% and armor by 3. 
Lasts 15 seconds.

name: Black Arrows
description:
Fires up to 2 black arrows at nearby units, decreasing their armor by 5. 

Armor reduction lasts 10 seconds

name: Serpentine Agility
description: Gives a 65% chance to avoid an attack.

name: Lesser Healing Wave
description: Calls forth a wave of healing energy that bounces up to 4 times, healing 500 hit points on the primary target. Each jump heals 50% less hit points (8 second Cooldown).

name: Hyper Shot
description: Due to keen eyesight, allows a far more powerful series of attacks to be levied against units in the air

name: Bombs Away
description: Attacks have a 20% chance of releasing bomb shrapnel which will deal 50 damage to 4 nearby enemies.

name: Guilty Conscience
description: Overcome by the weight of his life choices, the Slavemaster takes 50% extra damage from magic sources

name: Field Kit
description:
The Highguard bandages himself, restoring 800 health over 10 seconds.  

Highguard cannot bandage himself while Defend is active.

name: Crystal Shield
description: Blocks 1 damage from all attacks

name: Scourge of Elwynn
description:
Hogger scourge of Elwynn!  Hogger teach enemies lesson! You no take candle!


Nearby enemy units are enveloped in a poisonous cloud that deals 20 damage per second - but cannot kill. Any of these units that attack Hogger become infected and slowed by 25% (ms/as)   

Does not stack with other slow poisons

name: Triple Fire Ball
description: Every time this unit attacks, it hits 2 additional enemies.

name: Alpha Charlie
description: Wake up a single militia from his nap time and get him into the fight, soldier!

name: Spiked Carapace
description: Returns 30% of melee damage received back to attackers.

Curses a target enemy unit, causing it to have a 10% chance to miss on an attack.
 
Lasts 10 seconds, (2 seconds on bosses).

name: Harvest Soul
description: Harvests the soul of the first unit he kills each round, converting it into 8 lumber.  At the end of each round, receive another 8 lumber for each remaining Shadow Council unit.

name: Greater Curse
description:
Curses a target enemy unit, causing it to have a 20% chance to miss on an attack.
 
Lasts 20 seconds, (3 seconds on bosses).

name: Sweeping swing
description: Gives a 25% chance that an attack will deal 15 damage to nearby units. (Ground Only)

name: Bounce
description: Attacks bounce to one additional target, dealing 50% damage

name: Titanium Plating
description: Pure titanium coats the Doomsday Machine, granting it an additional 3 armor

name: Subterfuge
description:
The Dread Lord grants the gift of evading enemy attacks to certain nearby lesser mortal allies within 600 range. 

Nearby allies who do not already have an evasion ability gain 15% evasion

name: Violate
description: Attacks reduce the armor of enemy units by 1 for 4 seconds (2 sec on King).

name: Company Assemble
description:
Commands the infantry, soldier! 

Provides 1 additional armor to nearby friendly units for each 10 militia in the company.  

Sir Yes Sir!

Calls down waves of falling stars that damage nearby enemy units every 5 seconds. Each wave deals 150 damage. 
Lasts for 20 seconds

name: Enfeeble
description: Units close to the Death Dragon become sick, losing 2 armor.

name: Slam
description: Slaming 'n' danking

name: Siege Mastery
description: This unit has deals double damage to units with fortified armor type.

name: Insignificant Other
description: This unit is often ignored in the battle field as often deemed a non-threat. Frail creature as it is, it takes 65% increased damage from magic

name: Summon Phoenix Egg
description:
Every 5 seconds, the Archmage will summon a Phoenix Egg that cannot attack, but will cast a 2 small blizzard waves that deal 100 damage each to all nearby units and slow their movement speed by 25%.  

Phoenix Eggs last for ten seconds
Slow stacks with other slows

name: Planed
description: Gives a 33% chance to dodge an attack.

name: Death Bass
description: Deals 130 damage to up to 4 units around the Hellraiser.

Causes rains of healing energy to pour down in a large area (1500 radius), healing friendly allied units for 125 hit points per second. 

Lasts 9 seconds.

name: Dangerous Mine
description: Returns 7 damage to melee attackers and has a chance to return damage to range attackers.

name: Withdraw
description:
Causes this unit to attack 90% slower, but become impervious to damage for 1.5 seconds. Automatically cast when 15% or less hit points.

May not activate if this unit is killed too quickly.

name: Faerie Luck
description: Gives a 15% chance to dodge an attack.
Slams the ground, dealing 125 damage to nearby enemy land units and slowing their movement by 30% and attack rate by 30% for 5 seconds.
Over 10 seconds gradually release 50 locusts that deal 13.5 dps. After 20 seconds, or after dealing 50 damage, they return to the dreadlord and heal him for 75% of the damage dealt.

name: Multishot
description: Fire Arrows at three additional enemies

name: Hero of the People
description: The Tauren Chieftain gains massive amounts of health, and regenerates health each second
When killed, the Tauren Chieftain will come back to life after 1 second.

Units in a 300 AOE around Dark Ranger's attack miss 75% of attacks for 3 seconds. 
(1 second on boss units)

name: Karma
description: Krogoth has a 20% chance on being hit to go into a rage and increase his attack speed by 50% for 6 seconds

name: Mirror of Truth
description:
Allows the Death Knight to peer into the unknown and reveal what is hidden. 

This takes an incredible amount of effort on his part, and may only be done once.

name: Unafraid
description: Crusaders do not fear champions and will not lose armor when facing them!

name: Hand of God
description: The Paladin is graced by heaven's touch. He, and one other chosen unit close to him become nearly impervious to all damage for 8 seconds.

name: Awaken The Dead
description:
Raises up 6 undead ghoul fanatics to attack the enemies of their master! Lasts 60 seconds. (60 second cooldown)

(52-67 Damage, 0.7 AS, 750HP, Hero Armor)

name: Split Shot!
description:
As long as the Gryphon Rider's mana pool holds out, each of her attacks will tie a small albatross onto two additional magical arrows and fire at two additional enemy targets. 

Each albatross-infused arrow costs 3 mana.

If the Gryphon Rider runs out of mana, this ability is disabled until the next round.

name: Porter
description: This warrior can carry a variety of items with him., but can't use them.

name: Death and Decay
description: Damages all enemy units within 700 range for 1.2% of their max health every second

name: Dark Ritual
description:
Creates a shield of dark frost around a target friendly unit. The shield adds 15 armor and slows melee units that attack it for 5 seconds. 

Lasts 45 seconds / Cooldown 8 seconds
Blasts enemy units with a wave of frost that deals 50 damage to the target, and 100 damage to nearby units. Applies slowing effect to movement and attack rate for 3 seconds.

name: Adrenaline Rush
description:
Boosts movement speed and attack speed of friendly units by 12.5%.
Range: 750
